awakening.after: Unleashes explosions from her hands (at full power, enough to wreck a whole van).
awakening.before: Ignition — about a match's worth of flame.

name: Shido Alisa
quote: "Hah? Don't come near me. One step closer and I'll knock you flat."
warden: Good grief… it overlaps Shido Alisa's file. All "come any closer and I'll hit you" — yet one kind word and she wavers. Don't tell her I said so.

awakening.after: They briefly do whatever she says — even without being won over.
awakening.before: If she can win someone over, they briefly do whatever she says.

name: Natsume Anan
quote: "It is time for sleep. Thou shalt not give orders to mine self."
warden: Good grief… it overlaps Natsume Anan's file. Not a word out of her all day — but hand her a pen, and suddenly she writes like a literary master.

awakening.before: Only while she is being seen (an image or photo counts), she can watch the one seeing her from above, like a surveillance camera.

name: Sawatari Coco
quote: "Ugh, gross…! Why can't everyone except me and my oshi just die already?"
warden: Good grief… it overlaps Sawatari Coco's file. Every other word out of her is "gross" — but get her talking about her oshi, and she wears the face of a perfectly ordinary girl.

awakening.after: Can kill a witch (cannot be used on anything other than a witch).
awakening.before: Drains a witch's vitality — though only enough to leave her a little tired.

name: Sakuraba Ema
quote: "Witches aren't scary at all! If we all put our strength together, it'll work out somehow!"
warden: Good grief… this record overlaps Sakuraba Ema's file. That girl — terrified of being alone, yet forever fussing over everyone else first.

awakening.after: Can set any number of things afloat.

name: Tono Hanna
quote: "How disgraceful~! Would it not be better to simply give up?!"
warden: Good grief… it overlaps Tono Hanna's file. Her fine-lady act is full of holes — but that needlework of hers is the genuine article, you know.

awakening.after: On death, can return to any day, however far back (each use deepens her witchification, so it cannot be used many times).
awakening.before: On death, returns to the morning of that same day.

name: Nikaido Hiro
quote: "I'm sorry — but once you die, it truly does get easier."
warden: Good grief… it overlaps Nikaido Hiro's file. The louder a girl talks about justice, the more this bird worries, you know.

awakening.after: Forces the target to take interest in her.
awakening.before: Guides a target's gaze and pins it in place.

name: Hasumi Leia
quote: "Oh? Talking about me? Do go on."
warden: Good grief… any way I look at it, this overlaps Hasumi Leia's file. The great star secretly watches cat videos on her breaks — you didn't hear that from me.

awakening.after: Reproduces with her own mouth the voices inside other people's heads.
awakening.before: Reproduces with her own mouth any voice she has heard.

name: Hosho Margo
quote: "Ufufu… say, won't you come to my side? I'm simply itching to know more about you."
warden: Good grief… it overlaps Hosho Margo's file. Don't trust a single one of that girl's smiles. …Then again, she'd say the same about me.

awakening.after: Can heal hearts as well. She can also command owls.
awakening.before: Heals wounds — more precisely, a power of bodily regeneration, of winding flesh back.

name: Hikami Meruru
quote: "U-um… if you'd like, please use this… I-I'm sorry, I'm sorry…!"
warden: Good grief… this record overlaps Hikami Meruru's file… doesn't it. …No. Say one word more about that one and it comes out of my salary. We're done here — it's quitting time.

awakening.after: Can swap — or share — thoughts with another person.
awakening.before: Can swap bodies with someone who consents.

name: Saeki Miria
quote: "Eat up properly, now… once you get old, you can't put it away like you used to…"
warden: Good grief… it overlaps Saeki Miria's file. Pretty as a picture, talks like a middle-aged man. Best life advice in the whole prison, mind you.

awakening.before: Touching a person or thing shows her visions of its past or future — but only at random.

name: Kurobe Nanoka
quote: "I don't mind dying. Everyone dies eventually anyway."
warden: Good grief… it overlaps Kurobe Nanoka's file. Always alone, forever going missing — a troublesome prisoner. …As for what she's searching for, I'll go on pretending I don't know.

awakening.after: Paints directly inside the mind (makes people see visions).
awakening.before: Liquid control — the pictures she paints are repainted by magic (it activates on its own).

name: Jogasaki Noa
quote: "Ahh, Noa's not eating today. Can't paint it, see. The picture Noa wants to paint. Why is that, why is that?"
warden: Good grief… it overlaps Jogasaki Noa's file. The whole world praises that girl's paintings — though the ones she truly wants seen are, I suspect, not those.

awakening.after: Extreme physical reinforcement (she can do things like throw a shockwave with her fist).

name: Tachibana Sherry
quote: "Ufufu! So this is… a locked-room murder! Just like a mystery novel~! How thrilling!"
warden: Good grief… it overlaps Tachibana Sherry's file. Our great detective's curiosity has nearly studied the cell locks to pieces. And whose salary pays for the repairs, I wonder.
